summary: All three requirements (REQ-5, REQ-6, REQ-7) are fully implemented. AdminPage.tsx is created with the required table, navy/gold theme, empty state, loading skeletons, and useGetAllMembers hook. Layout.tsx adds the Admin link to both desktop and mobile menus. App.tsx registers the /admin route alongside / and /signup.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats summary bar showing counts of Total Members, Players, Fans, and Supporters
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a table showing each member's name, email, role, and sign-up timestamp. A stats bar with per-role counts was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Loading skeleton UI while members are being fetched
hallucinated_features.reason: Loading skeleton/placeholder states were not mentioned in the requirements or acceptance criteria.
